summary:
Manhandling of the thyroid gland during surgery can induce a stress response, potentially triggering thyroid storm by activating stored thyroid hormones; improper preoperative management is also crucial, increasing the chance of an uncontrolled hormone release upon surgical intervention. \boxed{} The primary reasons for thyroid storm are manhandling of the thyroid gland during surgery and insufficient preoperative medical preparations. Thus,\boxed{A}. 

The correct answer should be A based on this summary.
